name: seed corpus: F-2 /measure-rubric reads seed/fp-examples/<rule-id>/examples.jsonl as the initial false-positive log when no real FP log exists yet
command: mkdir -p rubric/fp-log && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/f2-bootstrap-from-seed.sh" --rule g-ts-001 && [ -s rubric/fp-log/g-ts-001.jsonl ] && echo ok 1>&2
